title: phaleria dubiosa
intro: Phaleria dubiosa, also known as the 'Yellow Bird' or 'Phaleria', is a tropical plant native to the Pacific Islands, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Phaleria dubiosa include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in the Pacific region.
